title: Contain CKC local fallback state and persistence receipts
operator_request: Capture the local-only state risk found during MT-010: CKC album/media UI fallback must not make non-persistent edits look like real backend authority.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Resume by separating demo/local fallback state from persisted backend authority in UI, tests, and manual text.

scope.summary: Make CKC local/demo fallback state visibly degraded, optionally disable mutating controls when backend is absent, and require receipts for persisted claims.
base_scope: Audit CKC local fallback paths for character, album, media notes, search/tag notes, story, moodboard, and sheet artifact operations.
Mark local-only mutations with visible and Argus-readable degraded/local state.
Disable or require explicit degraded-mode acknowledgement for local-only mutating controls if they can be mistaken for persisted backend writes.
Add receipt/readout requirements before UI or models can claim a CKC write persisted.
Update manual recovery instructions for backend-down CKC work.
acceptance_criteria: Every CKC local-only mutation path surfaces local/degraded/non-persistent status through Argus-readable nodes.
Persisted-write claims require backend success receipt, backend response row, or documented durable artifact.
Backend-down/local demo mode cannot be mistaken for canonical PostgreSQL/CRDT authority in manual text.
Tests prove local album/media mutations do not present themselves as persisted writes.
Operator/model recovery steps explain how to reload from backend authority after local fallback use.
risks_and_controls: Risk: models continue work from local-only state and later lose changes. Control: local status nodes and no persisted wording without receipts.
Risk: disabling all fallback makes UI unusable for demos/tests. Control: keep demo mode but label it explicitly.
Risk: receipt wording is inconsistent across CKC surfaces. Control: add shared status wording helper or tests across surfaces.
verification: Manual text tests for backend-down/local fallback recovery.
Search for misleading persisted/saved wording in local-only paths.

handoff.note: Created from MT-010 review finding that no-backend fallback can mutate local state and look real.
